columns.extraction_plan: The median PFS in the orteronel (treatment) group was 47.6 months, as stated in the abstract on page 1 and the 'Secondary End Points' section on page 4. This is also visually represented in Figure 2 on page 4.
The median PFS in the control group was 23.0 months, as stated in the abstract on page 1 and the 'Secondary End Points' section on page 4. This is also visually represented in Figure 2 on page 4.
From Table A3 on page 13, under the 'Extensive' disease group, the 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is '2.2 years'. Converting to months: 2.2 * 12 = 26.4 months.
From Table A3 on page 13, under the 'Extensive' disease group, the 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '1.1 years'. Converting to months: 1.1 * 12 = 13.2 months.
From Table A3 on page 13, under the 'Minimal' disease group, the 'PFS Orteronel Median/5 Year' is 'NR' (Not Reached).
From Table A3 on page 13, under the 'Minimal' disease group, the 'PFS Control Median/5 Year' is '3.6 years'. Converting to months: 3.6 * 12 = 43.2 months.
